meta.title: OsteoJP — Patient Portal
meta.description: Manage your appointments, forms, and documents.

common.tagline: Your body relaxes, your mind thanks you
common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.welcome_subtitle: Manage your appointments, forms and documents.
auth.login_magic_link_sent: We sent a link to {{email}}. Check your inbox.
auth.login_no_account: Don't have access yet? Your clinic will be in touch.
auth.reset_password_email: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.reset_password_error: Could not send the link. Please try again.
auth.activate_subtitle: Set your password to start using the portal.
auth.activate_invalid_desc: The activation link is no longer valid. Request new access to continue.
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

dashboard.next_appointment_empty_description: When you book an appointment, it will appear here.
dashboard.form_pending_banner: You have a form to complete before your appointment.

booking.title: Book appointment
booking.no_slots: No slots available on this date. Try another day or contact the clinic.
booking.therapist_preference_placeholder: E.g. I prefer my usual therapist
booking.therapist_preference_hint: Therapist assignment is done by reception. Your preference will be taken into account where possible.
booking.note_placeholder: Any relevant information for your appointment...
booking.pending_body: Your booking is awaiting confirmation from reception. You will receive an SMS when it is confirmed.
booking.error_submit: Could not submit booking. Please try again or call the clinic.
booking.error_slot_taken: This slot is no longer available. Choose another time or contact the clinic.
booking.rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
booking.no_slots_day: No slots available on this day.
booking.choose_date_prompt: Choose a date to see available times.
booking.step_info_pending: Your booking will await confirmation from reception. You will receive an SMS when it is confirmed.
booking.load_error_title: Could not open the booking flow
booking.load_error_description: An error occurred loading available slots. Please try again.

appointments.title: My appointments
appointments.action_reschedule_hint: To reschedule, please call the clinic.
appointments.cancel_body: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
appointments.cancel_too_late: Appointments cannot be cancelled less than 24 hours in advance. Please call the clinic.
appointments.cancel_error: Could not cancel. Please try again or call the clinic.

forms.title: My forms
forms.general_anamnese_subtitle: Personal details, health history and GDPR consent
forms.submit_success: Form submitted. Your therapist will review it before your appointment.
forms.submit_error: Could not submit. Please try again.
forms.field_consent_treatment: I consent to the proposed treatment.
forms.field_consent_data: I consent to the processing of my personal data for clinical purposes, under GDPR.
forms.consent_required: Your consent is required to proceed.
forms.forms_info: Intake forms are completed at the clinic. Here you can track the status of the forms you submitted.

documents.title: Documents
documents.download_error: Could not download document. Please try again.
documents.empty_description: Your documents and declarations will appear here.
documents.load_error_description: An error occurred loading your documents. Please try again.

clinics.title: Our clinics
clinics.subtitle: We are present in Linda-a-Velha and Castelo Branco.
clinics.general_info: For emergencies or general questions, call the clinic directly. Online bookings are available up to 24 hours before your appointment.

account.title: My account
account.reminders_off_warning: Disabling reminders means you will not receive appointment notifications.
account.edit_error: Could not update. Please try again.
account.logout_confirm_message: You will need to sign in again to access the portal.
account.delete_account_confirm: Are you sure? This action is irreversible and all your data will be deleted.

errors.404_body: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.403_body: You do not have permission to view this page.
errors.500_body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.offline_body: Check your internet connection and try again.
errors.load_appointments_desc: An error occurred loading your appointments. Please try again.
errors.load_documents_desc: An error occurred loading your documents. Please try again.
errors.load_forms_desc: An error occurred loading your forms. Please try again.
errors.load_dashboard_desc: An error occurred loading your information. Please try again.

error.unauthorized: Invalid session. Please sign in again.
error.serverError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.invalidInput: Invalid data. Please check your input and try again.
error.serviceUnavailable: This service is not available for online booking.
error.locationUnavailable: This clinic is not available for online booking.
error.slotInPast: You cannot book an appointment in the past.
error.noSlot: No slots available for this combination. Try another day or contact the clinic.
error.cutoff: Appointments cannot be cancelled or rescheduled less than 24 hours in advance. Please call the clinic.
error.notReschedulable: This appointment cannot be rescheduled (it has already been cancelled or completed).

fichaGeral.title: General intake form
fichaGeral.subtitle: Personal details, health history and GDPR consent

error.therapyNotAllowed: The general intake form is not therapy-specific.
error.invalidPayload: Invalid form data. Please try again.

status.underReview: Your therapist will review the form before your appointment.
